title: bony auto-weights output
description: Output of 'bony auto-weights'. Per-vertex weighted influences ready for use as MeshInfluence data in bony skinned mesh attachments.

vertices.description: One entry per input vertex, in the same order.

influences.description: Bone influences sorted by weight descending. Weights sum to 1.0.

bindX.description: Vertex X offset from bone world position at bind pose (worldVertexX - boneWorldX).

bindY.description: Vertex Y offset from bone world position at bind pose (worldVertexY - boneWorldY).

weight.description: Normalized skin weight (0..1). All influences for a vertex sum to 1.0.
